test.notes: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or the root package.json, and the mission guidance says no E2E tests are needed for this refactoring milestone.

typecheck.notes: Per mission AGENTS.md, root type checking is validated through the build pipeline rather than a separate tsc command.

lint.notes: Lint exited 0 with warnings only; no errors blocked the milestone validators.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Generalize the fire-and-forget guidance beyond triggerWebhook so intentionally unawaited promise chains, such as lazy analytics imports, are expected to attach .catch() handlers when failures would otherwise become unhandled rejections.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The bundle-dynamic-posthog review flagged packages/lib/client-only/hooks/use-analytics.ts:28-29 and :44-45 for using a void dynamic import chain without .catch(), while /Users/duncan/.factory/missions/8cede67d-8162-4f99-883a-7f13a937d807/AGENTS.md only documents the pattern for triggerWebhook.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when React.lazy() can be used directly under Suspense in streaming SSR routes versus when a client-only guard is required for browser-only modules such as the PDF viewer.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The bundle-lazy-recharts review compared apps/remix/app/routes/_authenticated+/admin+/stats.tsx:37-49,179 with apps/remix/app/components/general/pdf-viewer/pdf-viewer-lazy.tsx:14-29 and noted that the repo uses both valid patterns without shared guidance explaining the distinction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly allow investigation-only outcomes when the correct result is to prove a proposed refactor is not viable and document the finding instead of changing source code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The bundle-framer-motion-imports review confirmed the feature was completed correctly by documenting tree-shaking behavior in .factory/library/framer-motion-imports.md after verifying framer-motion subpaths could not replace the current imports, but the skill text still frames success as source refactoring plus a perf commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add scoping guidance for refactor-only workers so incidental formatter or translation churn is either avoided or split into separate commits before finishing a feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The bundle-link-prefetch review found unrelated class-order reformatting in apps/remix/app/components/forms/signup.tsx and unrelated translation extraction changes in packages/lib/translations/en/web.po plus locale files, even though the feature itself only targeted Link prefetching.
